art_highlights: March 2026 sees diverse global focus: Joan Snyder's abstracts at Canada, NYC; Lisa Yuskavage at Zwirner
Sam Gilliam's 1990s stitched works featured at Pace Gallery, NYC
LA Nomadic Division presents 'sister dreamer' by Lauren Halsey; Hammer Museum screens Arthur Jafa's 'The White Album'
Chicago art scene active with 'LENS2026' photography exhibition and George Klauba survey 'KLAUBA' at Art Center Highland Park
CCA Tashkent debuts with 'Hikmah', exploring wisdom and material transformation

market_summary.key_drivers: Intensified Middle East conflict impacting energy prices (Brent up to $108.65/bbl) and inflation fears
market_summary.trend: Stock markets (DJI, Nasdaq, S&P 500) under pressure, closing at yearly lows; Fed rate cut expectations vanishing
